Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.InstantMessageParticipant

Represent an instant message participant

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
PersonId

The unique id of a person

 integer

None.
Name

Name to display

 string

None.
AvatarUrl

URL to avatar image for this participant

 string

None.
LocationType

LocationType tells which type of "resource" the LocationId refers to, Course = 1, Project = 2, Hierarchy = 3 etc.

 integer

None.
LocationId

Id of Course, Project, Hierarchy etc. see LocationType

 integer

None.
